g.text: Perception + learning economics: Skyvern vs Rote
fallback != verification: not erroring is not
the same as the outcome being correct
closest competitor in spirit (record -> cache -> fallback);
Rote undercuts its vision-set cost floor
Why Rote wins: Skyvern's cost floor is set by screenshots on every step; Rote's
cold loop reads a distilled accessibility tree and escalates to vision only when
needed. And where Skyvern falls back when cached code errors, Rote asserts the
outcome actually happened before claiming success.
